g.text: SELECT * FROM users WHERE name BETWEEN 'A' AND 'D'
Sequential leaf scan: 3 page reads O(K) where K = matching leaf pages
Random table lookups: up to 7 page reads one per distinct rowid page
Blue animated — sequential leaf chain traversal
Red dashed — random table B-tree lookups
Purple — index tree descent O(log N) = 2 reads
Gray leaf — STOP node key exceeds upper bound
